name: challenge-builder-recovery
task: Fix and recover the active Challenge Builder worktree: resolve the current merge-conflict lane safely, infer the intended change from repository and planning evidence, preserve unrelated edits, finish the smallest coherent slice, and verify it with focused tests.
playbook_description: Reproduce, isolate, fix, and verify a bug.

alternates.description: Build a user-facing feature across UI, API, data, and tests.

workflow.output: fix with reproduction and verification evidence
workflow.validation: run the failing command or narrow regression test
workflow.recovery: if reproduction is missing, gather exact error and command first

routing_facts: plan: Active Milestone: M002: Participant Engagement — XP, Levels, Badges & Notifications

steps.reason: Build a tight feedback loop before theorizing.
steps.selection_reason: best installed match (115) for root cause debugging

steps.reason: Patch the smallest shared source of the bug.
Lock the bug down with a red-green regression test.
Review the fix for regressions and scope.
steps.selection_reason: best installed match (60) for code review
